response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in software development and some exposure to AI and fintech, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and senior technical leadership at scale.
strengths: Experience with diverse technologies and programming languages
Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing
concerns: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI and fintech infrastructure
Not clear if they have experience operating AI systems in regulated environments
No clear indication of experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ people

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI
Experience in software development and leadership
